summary: Comprehensive testing of redesigned Admin Panel with Overview and Salespeople tabs. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verify all requested features are working correctly including Company Totals, key rates, Lead Status pie chart, full ranking table with rank badges, click-to-filter salesperson dashboard, and User Management.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height -1 when component renders before container size is determined. This is a known minor Recharts issue that doesn't affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com / Benja123) - returns token and role=admin
Backend: /admin/comparison returns correct structure with comparison array and totals object
Backend: Totals include all required fields: total_leads, closed_deals, lost_deals, total_revenue, total_commission, closing_rate, avg_ticket, access_pct, pm_jobs, pm_pct, gp_pct
Backend: Each salesperson has all required fields including per-metric rank values (_rank suffix)
Backend: Ranking logic correct - comparison sorted by overall_position
Backend: Rank badges are valid integers 1 to N
Backend: Pay period filter accepted
Backend: Date filter accepted
Backend: /admin/salespeople endpoint returns users without password_hash
Backend: Role change endpoint validates role values
Backend: Non-admin users cannot access admin endpoints (returns 403)
Frontend: Admin Overview tab displays Company Totals (Revenue, Commission, Closed, Total Leads, Lost)
Frontend: Admin Overview shows key rates: R%, Access %, Avg Ticket, GP %, PM Jobs, PM %
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Lead Status pie chart (Closed/Pending/Lost with percentages)
Frontend: Admin Salespeople tab shows full ranking table with all columns: Overall, Salesperson, R%, Access %, Sales, Avg Ticket, Net Value, Total Jobs, PM Jobs, GP %, PM %
Frontend: Each metric in ranking table has individual rank badges (gold #1, silver #2)
Frontend: Top Performer banner displays correctly with name, R%, revenue, and sales count
Frontend: User Management section shows all users with Change Role buttons
Frontend: Change Role button reveals 'Make Admin' and 'Cancel' options
Frontend: Click salesperson name in ranking table filters to their dashboard
Frontend: Filter banner shows with 'Show All' button when viewing specific salesperson
Frontend: NO DUPLICATE INFORMATION between Overview and Salespeople tabs confirmed
critical_code_review_comments: Good: /admin/comparison endpoint correctly returns all new fields: avg_ticket, access_pct, pm_jobs, pm_pct, gp_pct, and per-field _rank values
Good: AdminOverview.js shows Company Totals + Key Rates + Lead Status pie - no duplication with Salespeople tab
Good: AdminPanel.js shows full ranking table with RankBadge component for each metric
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Click-to-filter salesperson feature works correctly
Minor: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions are cosmetic and don't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel redesign tested successfully. Overview tab shows Company Totals + Key Rates + Lead Status pie. Salespeople tab shows full ranking table with all metrics and rank badges + User Management. No duplicate information between tabs. All features work as specified in requirements.
